name: Goat Survivor
short_description: Choose your character, grow stronger, and defeat endless waves of enemies! But simple combat isn’t enough—stand on the magic circle and survive for a set time to win. Strategically move and combine skills to create the best survival strategy!
detailed_description:
Goat Survivor – Only the best strategies will ensure survival!

Face endless waves of enemies and survive until the end with quick thinking and adaptability!
However, fighting alone won’t be enough—stand on the magic circle and stay there for a set time to claim victory!

Key Features:

🔥 Choose your character and upgrade their abilities!

  • Select from various characters with unique abilities and grow stronger over time.

  • Level up during battles and choose new skills to create your own combat style!

⚔️ Change the flow of battle!

  • Combine different skills to find the best strategy.

  • Decide when to fight and when to move onto the magic circle to secure victory.

🌀 Survival strategies and resource management

  • Collect gold during battles and use it to enhance your characters.

  • Manage special resources wisely, as each attempt offers new opportunities.

💀 Endless waves of enemies & unpredictable bosses!

  • As stages progress, enemies become stronger, and unexpected bosses appear.

  • A single decision can mean victory or defeat!

Test your survival skills in Goat Survivor!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, French, German
